steps.title: Require a concrete example
steps.content: The goal is not just to define surrealist collage or name a work. It asks for a specific example of irrational juxtaposition, so the sentence should name the actual disparate images placed together.

steps.title: Reject abstract answers
steps.content: Choice B uses Salazar's broad artistic quote. Choice C identifies Synchronicity as surrealist collage without naming the juxtaposed elements. Choice D describes the genre generally rather than giving the concrete example.

steps.title: Name the juxtaposed images
steps.content: Choice A lists the well-dressed man, clouded mountain range, and doorway to the stars in Synchronicity, giving the requested specific example. The answer is A.
